postLoginFlow.v2.contactsImport.text: Vexl fungerar genom riktiga kontakter — vänner och vänners vänner. Importera dina kontakter för att se vilka som redan är här.

offer.title: Offer
offer.noCommonFriendsExplanation: Ni har inga gemensamma vänner. Vad betyder det?
offer.noCommonFriends.title: Ni har inga gemensamma vänner
offer.noCommonFriends.description: Du ser det här erbjudandet eftersom den andra personen har sparat ditt telefonnummer i sin kontaktlista. Var försiktig, vi kan inte verifiera om ni verkligen känner varandra i verkligheten.
offer.clubOfferExplanation: Det här är ett klubberbjudande. Vad betyder det?
offer.clubOffer.title: Klubberbjudande
offer.clubOffer.description: Du ser det här erbjudandet eftersom den andra personen är medlem i samma klubb som du. Var försiktig, vi kan inte verifiera om ni verkligen känner varandra i verkligheten.
offer.offerNotFound: Offer not found. It might have been deleted by the author

offer.rerequestDays: You can send another request in {{days}} days.
offer.requestWasCancelledOrAccountDelete: Seems like other side has cancelled the request or deleted their account. Do you want to delete this request?

offer.otherSideAccountDeleted: Other side has deleted their account
termsOfUse.dontHaveTime2: Ont om tid? Kolla FAQ:n istället.
termsOfUse.cautiousNoticeAboutMachineTra: Cautious Notice: The following text has undergone machine translation for your convenience, to access the original English version, proceed to the web.
faqs.vexlIsPlatform: Vexl is a platform where you can trade Bitcoin within your real world social network - your friends and friends of their friends - while staying completely anonymous - if you wish.
faqs.peopleWhomYouAllowToSee: People you allow to see your identity can view your name and profile picture, and that's it.
faqs.howCanIStayAnonymous: Hur kan jag vara anonym och ändå använda Vexl?
faqs.byDefaultYouParticipateInTheNetwork: By default, you participate in the network under your Vexl name and Vexl avatar that were given to you during the registration. You can only reveal your identity per a particular trade in our secure, end to end encrypted chat.
faqs.howDoIKnowWhoIAmTalkingTo: Hur vet jag vem jag pratar med?
faqs.oneChallenge: One challenge with truly anonymous communications systems like Vexl is that sometimes you do need to verify the identity of the person you’re talking to! In cases like these, it’s best to use a secure secondary channel of communication to confirm with the other person that you’re both who you say you are.
faqs.areMyChatsAndDealsPrivate: Är mina chattar och affärer privata?
faqs.vexlIsOpensource: Vexl är öppen källkod - vem som helst kan leta efter bakdörrar eller skadliga avsikter. Du kan också läsa rapporten från en oberoende säkerhetsgranskning.
faqs.vexlIsDesigned: Vexl is designed to never collect or store any sensitive information. Vexl messages and other content cannot be accessed by us or other third parties because they are always end-to-end encrypted, private, and secure. Our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy are available below.
faqs.youCanAlwaysReachOutToUs: You can always reach out to us via email: support@vexl.it. For a private comms, you can also send us an e2ee mail. Or you can meet us during your next P2P trade! 😻
faqs.whatAreVexlClubsAndWhyShouldIJoin: What are Vexl Clubs and why should I join?
faqs.clubsConnectYouWithBroaderNetwork: Clubs connect you with a broader network, enabling opportunities outside your immediate friends. While Clubs offer more variety, trading within them is less secure than with Level 1 or Level 2 friends.
offerForm.somethingElseOnYourMind: Har du något annat i tankarna?
offerForm.discardNewOfferDescription: Om du stänger det här nu försvinner alla uppgifter du har fyllt i.
offerForm.location.onlineTradeWarning: Affärer ansikte mot ansikte är säkrare. Läs vad du bör se upp med när du handlar online.
offerForm.location.meetingInPersonSafer: Att träffas personligen är säkrare. Dela inte din hemadress om du inte litar helt på den andra personen.
offerForm.location.receivePaymentsSafely:
Pengar som skickas av en okänd person kan komma från brottslig verksamhet och vara spårbara. Skicka aldrig bitcoin innan du har fått betalningen.

Verifiera alltid namnet på kontoinnehavaren som du fick betalningen från mot motpartens angivna identitet.

Skicka adressen på ett säkert sätt och se till att verifiera den via en annan säker kanal.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.sellDescript: Lägg till en rabatt för att sälja snabbare, eller ett premium för att tjäna mer. Flytta reglaget för att se hur det påverkar efterfrågan.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.buyDescripti: Lägg till en rabatt för att köpa billigare, eller ett premium för att köpa snabbare. Flytta reglaget för att se hur det påverkar efterfrågan.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.youBuyForThe: You buy for the actual market price. Play with the slider to buy cheaply or faster.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.theOptimalPo: The optimal position for most people. You buy slightly faster, but a bit overpriced.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.youBuyReally: You buy quickly, but so much above the market price.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.youBuyPretty: You buy pretty cheap, but it can take slightly longer to find a seller.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.youBuyVeryCh: You buy very cheaply, but it can take a while to find seller.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.youSellForTh: You sell for the actual market price. Play with the slider to sell faster or earn more.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.youEarnBitMo: You earn a bit more, but it can take slightly longer.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.youEarnSoMuc: You earn so much more, but it can take a while.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.youSellSligh: You sell slightly faster, but a bit below market price
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.youSellMuchF: You sell much faster, but far below market price
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.slider.selli: Du säljer till marknadspris. Dra åt vänster för att sälja snabbare, eller åt höger för att tjäna mer.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.slider.earnB: Du tjänar lite mer, men det kan ta lite längre tid att hitta en köpare.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.slider.earnM: Du tjänar betydligt mer, men det kan ta längre tid att hitta en köpare.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.slider.sellS: Du säljer snabbare, men för lite mindre än marknadspris.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.slider.sellM: Du säljer väldigt snabbt, men klart under marknadspris.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.influenceImp: Influence the impact of your offer. Sell faster by adding a discount, or earn more by adding a premium to the Bitcoin market price.
Influence the impact of your offer. Buy cheaply by adding a discount, or buy faster by adding a premium to the bitcoin market price.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.playWithItAn: Play with it and see how it affects the interest of others.
offerForm.buyCheaperByUsingDiscount: Buy cheaper by using a discount or buy faster by adding a premium to the bitcoin market price
offerForm.sellFasterWithDiscount: Sell faster with a discount or earn more by adding a premium to the bitcoin market price.
offerForm.location.meetingInPerson: Meeting in person is safer. What to watch out for online?
offerForm.location.whatToWatchOutForOnli: What to watch out for online?
offerForm.location.moneySentByRandomPers: Money sent by a random person can be of criminal origin and traceable.
offerForm.location.neverSendCrypto: Never send bitcoin before receiving payment.
offerForm.location.alwaysVerifyTheName: Always verify the name of the account holder you received the payment from with the declared identity of the counterparty.
offerForm.location.forwardTheAddress: Forward the address in a secure manner and be sure to verify it through another secure channel.
offerForm.location.setAreaDescription: Ange området där du kan tänka dig att mötas för en affär. Det hjälper oss visa relevanta erbjudanden i närheten.
offerForm.location.meetingAreaDescriptio: Ange var du kan tänka dig att mötas. Du ser erbjudanden vars mötesområde överlappar ditt.
offerForm.pickupDescription: Choose the approximate location where you can hand out the item.
offerForm.deliveryDescription: Send the item using a third party delivery service.
offerForm.pickupDeliveryIsSafer: Pickup in person is safer. Never share your home address with anyone you don’t trust.

offerForm.thisItemDoesNotHaveSetPrice: This item does not have a set price.
offerForm.network.theBestOption: The best option for really small amounts. Usually super fast.
offerForm.network.lightningDescription: Bäst för mindre belopp. Snabbt och billigt.

reportIssue.predefinedBody: Hi! I am reporting an issue:
AppLogs.title: In app logs
AppLogs.warningShort: Loggar kan göra appen långsammare och använda mer lagring.
AppLogs.anonymizeAlert.title: Would you like to anonymize logs?
AppLogs.anonymizeAlert.text: We can try to strip private keys and personal information from logs before exporting them. Always make sure to verify by yourself.
suggestion.whatAreClubs2: Vad är Vexl Clubs och varför ska jag gå med?
suggestion.whatAreClubs2Text: Klubbar utökar ditt nätverk bortom dina direkta kontakter, så att du ser fler erbjudanden. Tänk på att handel med klubbmedlemmar är mindre betrodd än handel med dina nära vänner.
suggestion.howDoIJoinClub: Hur går jag med i en klubb?
suggestion.howDoIJoinClubText: Fråga runt på lokala BTC-meetups eller i Bitcoin-communityn. Många har redan egna klubbar. Om du driver en community eller ordnar meetups, kontakta oss på marketing@vexl.it så hjälper vi dig att skapa en ny klubb.
addContactDialog.youHaveAddedContactToVe: You have added {{contactName}} to your Vexl contacts.

notificationPrompt.explanation1.title: Enable notifications
notificationPrompt.explanation1.descript: Vexl relies on background notifications to distribute your offers, requests, and messages across your social network.
For Vexl to function properly, please make sure to enable notifications. You can always adjust your settings later.
notificationPrompt.explanation2.title: Are you sure?
notificationPrompt.explanation2.descript: Vexl REALLY relies on background notifications in order to work properly. Without notifications, you won’t get the best out of it.
